response: A LIGHTWEIGHT FRAME WITH ADVANCED COMPONENTS REDUCES WEIGHT BY 2% FOR EACH ADDITION. THE FINAL WEIGHT OF THE FRAME, W_F, IS W MINUS 2% OF W, WHICH IS W(1 - 0.02)^n. TO MEET THE DESIRED ENERGY EXPENDITURE REDUCTION, AL EX NEEDS TO ADD ADVANCED COMPONENTS UNTIL E(N) REACHES 0.25. THE FUNCTION E(N) = 1 - (1 - 0.02)^n SHOWS THE REDUCTION IN ENERGY EXPENDITURE. TO GET A 25% REDUCTION, AL NEEDS TO ADD A MINIMUM OF 3 ADVANCED COMPONENTS. THE WORD CLOCK APPEARS THREE TIMES IN THE RESPONSE.
